auth_notes: To enable authentication, set 'authentication' to either 'Entra' or 'LDAP'
scheduler_notes: Set 'scheduler' to 'lsf' or 'slurm'. Defaults to 'lsf' if not specified.
cgroup_earlyoom_notes: Set 'enabled' to true to launch the cgroup early-OOM watcher in VNC sessions. Set 'pretend' to true for dry-run mode (log what would be killed without actually killing).
